summary: Check if permissions defined by a devcontainer have been accepted by the authenticated user
description:
Checks whether the permissions defined by a given devcontainer configuration have been accepted by the authenticated user.

OAuth app tokens and personal access tokens (classic) need the `codespace` scope to use this endpoint.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: The git reference that points to the location of the devcontainer configuration to use for the permission check. The value of `ref` will typically be a branch name (`heads/BRANCH_NAME`). For more information, see "[Git References](https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2/Git-Internals-Git-References)" in the Git documentation.

parameters.name: devcontainer_path
parameters.description: Path to the devcontainer.json configuration to use for the permission check.

200.description: Response when the permission check is successful
